attributes.description: Alerts when transaction utilisation exceeds 85%. Limit exhaustion prevents new transactions.
attributes.name: [Oracle OTel] Transaction limit utilisation high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Oracle transaction limit utilisation high

### What fired
`transactions.usage / transactions.limit > 85%`.

### Why it matters
The `transactions` init parameter bounds concurrent active transactions. Exhaustion halts new DML.

### Triage
1. Look at the active transaction pattern.

### Remediation
- Raise `transactions` init parameter.

### Tuning
- 85% threshold.
